basic_details.job_title: BMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 29 Pharmacist, Technician and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) Various Paramedical Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 29 vacancies have been announced through the BMC Various Paramedical Recruitment 2026 for posts including Neurology Technician, Audio Cum Speech Therapist, Dialysis Technician, Laboratory Assistant, E.C.G. Technician, Laboratory Technician, Pharmacist, and X-Ray Technician.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.P.M.T. Neurology, Audiology and Speech Therapy Degree, B.Sc. Dialysis Technology, B.Sc. Chemistry/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Biotechnology, B.P.M.T. Cardio-Technology, B.Sc. + D.M.L.T., Pharmacy Diploma/Degree, B.P.M.T. Radiology / Diploma in Radiography
qualification.details: Neurology Technician: B.P.M.T. (Bachelor of Paramedical Technology-Neurology) from Maharashtra University of Health Sciences with 3 years full time degree and 12 months internship. Audio Cum Speech Therapist (Part Time): Degree in Audiology and Speech Therapy from recognized university with minimum 1 year experience in speech and hearing therapy or deaf clinic. Dialysis Technician: B.Sc. in Dialysis Technology from recognised university OR 12th passed with 1 year / 6 months certificate course in Dialysis Technology. Laboratory Assistant: B.Sc. Degree in Chemistry/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Biotechnology from recognized university and pass Trade Test conducted by MCGM. E.C.G. Technician: B.P.M.T. (Bachelor in Paramedical Technology in Cardio-Technology) 3.5 years full time from MUHS OR B.Sc. in Physics with 6 months experience in ECG and pass Trade Test. Laboratory Technician: B.Sc. + D.M.L.T. from recognized university OR B.P.M.T. in Laboratory Medicine from MUHS. Pharmacist: Diploma/Degree in Pharmacy from recognized board/university and registered with Maharashtra State Pharmacy Council. X-Ray Technician: B.P.M.T. in Radiology (3 years) with 6 months internship OR B.Sc. with Diploma in Radiography with 1 year experience OR 12th/MCVC with Diploma in Radiography with 2 years experience and pass Trade Test.

salary_details.details: Neurology Technician: Rs. 20000/- Per Month Audio Cum Speech Therapist (Part Time): Rs. 25000/- Per Month Dialysis Technician: Rs. 20000/- Per Month Laboratory Assistant: Rs. 16000/- Per Month E.C.G. Technician: Rs. 20000/- Per Month Laboratory Technician: Rs. 20000/- Per Month Pharmacist: Rs. 20000/- Per Month X-Ray Technician: Rs. 20000/- Per Month

selection_process: Merit List based on Educational Qualification and Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://portal.mcgm.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for BMC Various Paramedical Posts Recruitment 2026 is 24th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has announced a total of 29 vacancies for various paramedical posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for BMC Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the paramedical posts announced by BMC is 38 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will range from Rs. 16,000 to Rs. 25,000 per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these paramedical posts will be based on a Merit List prepared from educational qualifications and performance in an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Which educational qualifications are required for the posts?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications vary for each post and include degrees and diplomas in paramedical fields such as Neurology, Dialysis Technology, Pharmacy, Radiology, and Laboratory Sciences.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 1027/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories. Please refer to the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC), which is https://portal.mcgm.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the contract period for these positions?
faq.answer: These are contractual positions. The contract period is from 01st July 2026 to 31st March 2027.
